description: This is an automatically generated playbook based on the question: i want a playbook for defending against phishing

external_references.name: NIST SP 800-53 Security and Privacy Controls

items.content: Implement email filtering solutions to detect and block phishing attempts before they reach users.
Deploy and maintain anti-malware and anti-spam software on all endpoints and email servers.
Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all user accounts to reduce the impact of compromised credentials.
Conduct regular security awareness training for employees to recognize phishing attempts.
Require DMARC, DKIM, and SPF to prevent email spoofing
Implement banner warnings for external emails
Monitor and analyze email traffic for anomalies and phishing indicators.
Create a clear reporting process for suspected phishing emails
Isolate and investigate reported emails promptly
Contain and remediate any compromised accounts or systems
Develop an incident response plan for phishing attacks
Regularly update and patch all systems to protect against known vulnerabilities.
Perform simulated phishing exercises to test and improve user awareness.
